scope: bounded runtime uBLK started-export admission trace covering host preflight, control open, ADD_DEV, SET_PARAMS, data-queue open, FETCH_REQ queue/tag coverage, START_DEV, daemon service-loop ownership, first serviced request, and DEL_DEV cleanup
residual_risk: This runtime artifact does not cover fio workload breadth, mkfs or mount acceptance, online resize, crash durability, production block-device readiness, multi-queue scaling, capacity sizing, persistent identity, or userspace recovery.
